name: Custom Die-Cut Stickers
description: Precision-cut to any shape. Perfect for branding, events, or personal use.
longDescription: Our custom die-cut stickers are printed on premium vinyl with a UV-resistant laminate, making them waterproof and durable indoors or out. Choose your shape, size, and finish — we cut to any contour.

name: Sticker Sheet Pack
description: A4 sticker sheets packed with your design. Great for gifts and giveaways.
longDescription: Printed on high-quality gloss or matte paper, our sticker sheets let you pack multiple designs onto one sheet. Upload your artwork and we'll optimise the layout.

name: Holographic Sticker Bundle
description: Eye-catching holographic stickers. Pre-designed bundle, ships within 48 hours.
longDescription: Ready-to-ship holographic sticker bundle featuring our best-selling designs. Premium holographic vinyl with strong adhesive — perfect for laptops, bottles, and planners.

name: Kiss-Cut Stickers
description: Cut to shape on a square backing. Easy to peel and apply.
longDescription: Kiss-cut stickers are cut around the shape of your design but leave the backing intact, making them easy to peel. Ideal for product packaging and event giveaways.

name: Custom Photo Mug
description: Full-wrap personalised mug. Add a photo, name, or message.
longDescription: Our custom photo mugs are printed with a full-wrap sublimation process for vivid, long-lasting colour. Dishwasher safe and microwave safe. The perfect personalised gift.

name: Branded Business Mugs
description: Bulk branded mugs for offices, events, or merchandise. Quote required.
longDescription: Minimum 24 units. Full sublimation print with your company logo and brand colours. We'll send a proof for approval before printing. Bulk discounts available.

name: Magic Colour-Change Mug
description: Reveals your design when filled with a hot drink. A crowd-pleaser every time.
longDescription: The colour-change mug looks plain black when cold. Add a hot drink and your design magically appears. Printed with heat-reactive sublimation ink. Upload any image.

name: Custom Acrylic Keyring
description: Full-colour printed acrylic keyrings. Cut to any shape.
longDescription: Double-sided full-colour print on 3mm clear acrylic. Choose from standard shapes or supply your own. UV-stable inks won't fade. Silver split ring included.

name: Epoxy Dome Keyring
description: Shiny resin-domed keyring with your photo or logo. Premium feel.
longDescription: A metal keyring base with your design printed and sealed under a high-gloss epoxy dome. Scratch-resistant, durable, and looks luxurious. Great for events and gifts.

name: Woven Fabric Keyring
description: Soft woven fabric keyring with custom text or logo. Great for sports clubs.
longDescription: Woven not printed — meaning the design is part of the fabric, not just on the surface. Soft, tactile, and long-lasting. Perfect for clubs, schools, and events.
